extraction.one_line_summary: COSTA Rui won from breakaway with calculated sprint, holding off EVENEPOEL's late-race descent charge by just 2 seconds
tactical_patterns: EVENEPOEL Remco deliberately fragmented breakaway on climb to set up finale, closed 35 seconds on descent alone.
JUMBO-VISMA chased early break containing VINGEGAARD's GC rival VLASOV and teammate VINGEGAARD, prioritizing jersey defense over energy conservation.
COSTA Rui conserved energy throughout stage despite having sprint superiority, avoided all breakaway pacemaking before final kilometer.
BUITRAGO Santiago attacked from breakaway on final climb but miscalculated sprint threat, finished nowhere despite spending energy.

rider_signals.EVENEPOEL Remco: positive: closed 35 seconds in descent/final kilometer alone after breakaway work, showing exceptional time-trial strength in pursuit mode
rider_signals.COSTA Rui: positive: demonstrated tactical maturity avoiding all breakaway pulls despite clear sprint superiority, confidence management at highest level
rider_signals.VINGEGAARD Jonas: neutral: marked teammate SOLAIRE's dangerous early move with VLASOV, team prioritized GC defense over stage hunting
rider_signals.KEMNA Leonard: positive: second breakaway stage presence after earlier win, establishing pattern as break specialist
rider_signals.BUITRAGO Santiago: negative: wasted energy attacking from break despite inferior sprint, tactical miscalculation cost potential podium
